channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [STERPOW] Sterling Powergensys Ltd Reports Q3 and Nine Months Results for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Sterling Powergensys Ltd, a leading solar systems provider, has announced its unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended on 31st December 2025. The company's revenue from operations stands at INR 1,180.89 lakhs for the quarter and INR 3,651.22 lakhs for the nine months period. The total income from operations for the quarter is INR 1,219.84 lakhs and INR 3,711.13 lakhs for the nine months period. The company's total expenditure for the quarter is INR 743.35 lakhs and INR 2,094.65 lakhs for the nine months period. The profit before tax for the quarter is INR (63.64) lakhs and INR (134.55) lakhs for the nine months period. The net profit for the quarter is INR (63.64) lakhs and INR (134.55) lakhs for the nine months period. The total comprehensive income for the quarter is INR (63.64) lakhs and INR (134.55) lakhs for the nine months period. The company's earnings per share (EPS) for the quarter is (0.64) and (1.35) for the nine months period.

  • Sterling Powergensys Ltd reports Q3 and nine months results for FY 2025-26.
  • Revenue from operations for the quarter is INR 1,180.89 lakhs and INR 3,651.22 lakhs for the nine months period.
  • Total income from operations for the quarter is INR 1,219.84 lakhs and INR 3,711.13 lakhs for the nine months period.
  • Profit before tax for the quarter is INR (63.64) lakhs and INR (134.55) lakhs for the nine months period.
  • Net profit for the quarter is INR (63.64) lakhs and INR (134.55) lakhs for the nine months period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sterling Powergensys Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AMAGI] Amagi Media Labs Ltd.: Shareholders Approve Alteration of Articles of Association
item.description:
Amagi Media Labs Ltd. has announced the approval of alteration of the Articles of Association of the Company by inserting Article 64B. The alteration was approved by the Members of the Company through a Special Resolution passed by Postal Ballot and remote e-voting process on April 03, 2026. The new Article 64B stipulates that the top 2 investors by shareholding, provided they hold 6.00% shareholding in the Company on a fully diluted basis, are entitled to appoint one non-executive Director on the Board.

  • Amagi Media Labs Ltd. has approved the alteration of the Articles of Association of the Company by inserting Article 64B.
  • The alteration was approved by the Members of the Company through a Special Resolution passed by Postal Ballot and remote e-voting process on April 03, 2026.
  • The new Article 64B entitles the top 2 investors by shareholding to appoint one non-executive Director on the Board, provided they hold 6.00% shareholding in the Company on a fully diluted basis.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amagi Media Labs Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VIRTUALS] Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd Announces First and Final Call of ₹10/- per Partly Paid-up Equity Share
item.description:
Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd has informed the holders of its Partly Paid-up Equity Shares about the First and Final Call of ₹10/- per share. The call is payable during the period commencing from Friday, April 10, 2026 to Friday, April 24, 2026. The Company had earlier issued 1,02,56,651 Partly Paid-up Equity Shares on a rights basis in July 2025. The Board has fixed Thursday, April 02, 2026 as the Record Date for determining the Eligible Shareholders who shall be liable to pay the First and Final Call.

  • Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd announces First and Final Call of ₹10/- per partly paid-up equity share.
  • The call is payable during the period commencing from Friday, April 10, 2026 to Friday, April 24, 2026.
  • The Company had earlier issued 1,02,56,651 Partly Paid-up Equity Shares on a rights basis in July 2025.
  • The Board has fixed Thursday, April 02, 2026 as the Record Date for determining the Eligible Shareholders.
  • Trading in partly paid-up equity shares of the Company has been suspended on the Stock Exchanges with effect from April 02, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIRTUALSOFT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Call Money

item.title: [KDLL] KD Leisures Ltd: Board Approves Scrutinizer for e-Voting, AGM Notice, and Annual Report for FY 2023-2024
item.description:
KD Leisures Ltd announced that its Board of Directors met on 6th November 2025 and approved several matters, including the appointment of M/s. Amit Saxena & Associates as scrutinizer for the e-voting process during the Annual General Meeting (AGM) and remote e-voting. The Board also approved the notice of the AGM and the Director's Report, along with applicable annexures, for the financial year ending 31st March 2024. The meeting took place at the registered office in Mumbai and concluded at 4:00 PM IST.

  • KD Leisures Ltd Board Meeting held on 6th November 2025
  • M/s. Amit Saxena & Associates appointed as scrutinizer for e-voting during AGM
  • Notice of AGM and Director's Report approved for FY 2023-2024
  • Meeting concluded at 4:00 PM IST at the registered office in Mumbai

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KD Leisures Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IFINSEC] Gopal Bansal & Others Create Pledge of Equity Shares in India Finsec Ltd
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 on April 04, 2026 from Gopal Bansal & Others. The disclosure is regarding the creation of a pledge of Equity Shares of M/s India Finsec Limited. The disclosure is in the prescribed format as per the regulations.

  • Gopal Bansal & Others have created a pledge of Equity Shares in India Finsec Ltd
  • The creation of the pledge is in accordance with Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • The pledge is of Equity Shares of M/s India Finsec Limited
  • The disclosure is in the prescribed format as per the regulations
  • The disclosure has been made to The Exchange

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIA FINSEC LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TULIVE] Tulive Developers Ltd. Announces Voluntary Delisting from BSE Limited: Committee of Independent Directors Constituted
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tulive Developers Ltd. has announced its voluntary delisting from BSE Limited. The company has constituted a Committee of Independent Directors to provide reasoned recommendations on the Delisting Offer. The Committee members include Mr. Jacob George Kandathil, Mr. Pradeep Bhandari, and Mrs. Bhumika Jignesh Shah. The recommendations of the Committee, along with the details of the Voting Pattern, will be published in the same newspapers as the Detailed Public Announcement (DPA) at least two working days before the commencement of the bidding period. This disclosure is made in terms of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Tulive Developers Ltd. announces voluntary delisting from BSE Limited
  • A Committee of Independent Directors has been constituted for the Delisting Offer
  • The Committee includes Mr. Jacob George Kandathil, Mr. Pradeep Bhandari, and Mrs. Bhumika Jignesh Shah
  • Recommendations of the Committee and Voting Pattern details will be published in the same newspapers as the DPA
  • The disclosure is made in terms of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tulive Developers Limited | Category: Delisting

item.title: [GODREJCP] Godrej Consumer Products Ltd Reports Q4 FY26 Double-Digit Sales Growth
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Godrej Consumer Products Ltd (GCPL) has reported a double-digit underlying sales growth and high-single digit underlying volume growth in Q4 FY26 for its Standalone business. The company's Indonesia business is showing signs of stabilization, with mid-single digit underlying volume growth in Q4. The GAUM (Godrej Africa, USA, and Middle East) business continues to deliver strong results, with double-digit sales growth and high-single volume growth. At a Consolidated level, GCPL expects to deliver close to double-digit revenue growth in Q4 FY26. The company is closely monitoring the sharp uptick in crude oil prices and has taken preemptive measures to mitigate the impact. GCPL remains confident in its portfolio, the strength of its brands, and its ability to deliver sustained, profitable growth going forward.

  • Godrej Consumer Products Ltd reports double-digit underlying sales growth and high-single digit underlying volume growth in Q4 FY26 for its Standalone business.
  • Indonesia business of GCPL shows signs of stabilization with mid-single digit underlying volume growth in Q4.
  • GAUM (Godrej Africa, USA, and Middle East) business delivers strong results with double-digit sales growth and high-single volume growth.
  • Consolidated level, GCPL expects to deliver close to double-digit revenue growth in Q4 FY26.
  • Company closely monitors sharp uptick in crude oil prices and takes preemptive measures to mitigate the impact.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GODREJ CONSUMER PRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [HOMEFIRST] Home First Finance Company India Ltd Receives ESG Score of 71 from NSE Sustainability
item.description:
Home First Finance Company India Ltd has been assigned an ESG score of 71 by NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited, a Category I - SEBI registered ESG Rating Provider. This information was received via an email from BSE Limited on April 6, 2026. The score can be accessed on the NSE Sustainability website.

  • Home First Finance Company India Ltd receives an ESG score of 71 from NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited
  • NSE Sustainability is a Category I - SEBI registered ESG Rating Provider
  • The ESG score was received via an email from BSE Limited on April 6, 2026
  • The ESG score can be accessed on the NSE Sustainability website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Home First Finance Company India Ltd | Category: ESG Score

item.title: [PVSL] Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd Extends Corporate Guarantee to Wholly Owned Subsidiary Popular Autoworks Private Limited
item.description:
Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd (PVSL) has announced the extension of a Corporate Guarantee in favor of Axis Bank Limited for the renewal and enhancement of the Inventory funding facility (Jaguar Land Over DF Scheme) up to Rs.20,00,00,000/- (Rupees Twenty Crores only) for its wholly owned subsidiary, Popular Autoworks Private Limited. This decision is part of PVSL's commitment to support its subsidiary and ensure its operational efficiency. The guarantee is provided at arm's length and there is no impact on the company other than disclosure in the Financial Statements.

  • Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd extends Corporate Guarantee to Popular Autoworks Private Limited
  • Guarantee provided for the renewal and enhancement of the Inventory funding facility up to Rs.20,00,00,000/-
  • Guarantee provided at arm's length
  • No impact on the company other than disclosure in the Financial Statements
  • Popular Autoworks Private Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd | Category: Guarantee Extension

item.title: [AMIRCHAND] Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd Announces New Partnership
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd has announced a new partnership, significantly expanding its market reach and diversifying its product offerings. The partnership is expected to boost the company's revenue by 20% in the upcoming fiscal year.

  • Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd enters a strategic partnership
  • Partnership expected to increase revenue by 20%
  • New market reach and product diversification

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd | Category: Partnership
